title: micropyxis pumila var. ovalis
intro: Micropyxis pumila var. ovalis, also known as a small type of liverwort, is a non-vascular plant species that belongs to the class Marchantiopsida. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Micropyxis pumila var. ovalis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
